argument-hint YAML Quoting Playground

PR #2864 · Why argument-hint: [foo] breaks strict loaders (Copilot CLI ≥ 1.0.65) and argument-hint: "[foo]" doesn't. Type a frontmatter line below — the parser verdict updates live.

YAML frontmatter line

Parsed value

FormYAML parses asClaude CodeCopilot CLI ≥ 1.0.65
[api-name]array ["api-name"]renders by concat (lenient)silently drops skill
[number] [title]parse errorlenient fallbacksilently drops skill
"[api-name]"stringworksworks

Fix shipped in PR #2864 (closes #2863): wrap all 18 argument-hint values in src/skills/*/scripts/*.md in double quotes, mirrored to plugins/ by npm run build. Zero behavior change on Claude Code; makes the frontmatter valid, unambiguous YAML for every loader that validates argument-hint as a string.
